subject: A Boros Legion soldier in white-and-gold plate armor with a red helmet, sword drawn, deflecting an opponent's hammer blow
description: A soldier clad in white and gold plate armor with a distinctive red pointed helmet stands in a combat stance, sword extended forward. The figure is mid-action, having just deflected or blocked an opponent's large hammer strike — the hammer and armored blue forearm of the unseen opponent are visible entering the frame from the right. Shards of debris or shattered material fly through the air at the point of impact. The soldier's expression shows fierce determination. The background suggests a city environment, with vertical structures in muted grey tones. The Boros insignia appears on the shield held in the off-hand. Flavor text establishes this as a personal-motivation piece for a Boros Legion recruit.
foreground: White-and-gold armored soldier with sword and shield, debris flying from hammer impact
background: Urban cityscape in muted grey tones, vertical architecture
